title: Leptochloa asthenes
taxonomy: Leptochloa asthenes belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family. This plant is a species of grass that is native to Australia. The genus Leptochloa is further classified into several species, each with distinct characteristics and habitats. Leptochloa asthenes is an annual grass that grows in a variety of environments, including grasslands and open woodlands. As a member of the Poaceae family, Leptochloa asthenes shares characteristics with other grasses, such as its seed head and leaf morphology.
